messages.input: There is a water leak in Building C that has been running all morning.

llm_output.urgency_reasoning: An ongoing water leak causes immediate resource waste and potential structural damage.
llm_output.escalation_reason: Physical infrastructure issue requiring immediate on-site inspection and repair.
llm_output.brief_summary: A water leak in Building C has been running all morning and requires urgent facilities attention.

messages.input: The recycling bins are contaminated again and no one seems to be checking them.

llm_output.urgency_reasoning: Repeated contamination indicates a systemic issue affecting recycling effectiveness.
llm_output.escalation_reason: Recurring waste management issue requiring policy enforcement and staff education.
llm_output.brief_summary: Recycling bins are repeatedly contaminated with no oversight, undermining waste management goals.

messages.input: I want to report that one of our suppliers may not meet our sustainability policy.

llm_output.urgency_reasoning: Supplier non-compliance with sustainability policy creates regulatory and reputational risk.
llm_output.escalation_reason: Potential breach of supplier sustainability requirements needs formal procurement review.
llm_output.brief_summary: An employee has flagged that a supplier may not comply with the organisation's sustainability policy.
